title: viola podolica
intro: Viola podolica, also known as the Podolic Violet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Violaceae. It is a perennial herb native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Viola podolica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and creams, to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
